# Silverthread Labs

> AI automation agency building agentic AI systems, voice agents, and workflow automation for regulated industries. Self-hosted, production-grade.

## About

Silverthread Labs is an AI automation agency founded in 2019. We build production-grade, self-hosted AI systems that run business operations 24/7. Our focus is regulated industries where data privacy, compliance, and reliability are non-negotiable.

## Services

We offer 20+ specialized AI services including:

- **Agentic AI Systems** — autonomous agents that handle multi-step business workflows
- **Voice AI Agents** — phone-based AI for appointment booking, intake, and support
- **Workflow Automation** — end-to-end process automation across business tools
- **Custom AI Solutions** — RAG systems, fine-tuned models, and AI built on your data
- **Self-Hosted AI Infrastructure** — deploy AI on your servers, not third-party clouds
- **MCP Server Development** — custom Model Context Protocol integrations
- **Systems Integration** — connect HubSpot, Salesforce, QuickBooks, EHRs, and 50+ platforms
- **Web & SaaS Development** — full-stack applications and platforms
- **Mobile App Development** — iOS, Android, and cross-platform
- **Browser Extension Development** — Chrome, Firefox, and Edge

## Industries

Healthcare, Dental, Legal, Real Estate, Financial Services, Insurance, Restaurants & Hospitality, Salons & Beauty, Veterinary, Home Services, Automotive, E-commerce, Recruiting, Marketing Agencies, Property Management, Business Development.

## Products

- [Bloggen](https://www.silverthreadlabs.com/products/bloggen): AI-powered developer publishing platform
- [Ezly](https://www.silverthreadlabs.com/products/ezly): AI communication assistant for freelancers
